title: Timezone Bot - Event Detection Output (MVP v1)

trigger.description: Whether the bot should react (run conversion) to this message window

polarity.description: Positive = useful for coordination/availability; Negative = past/refusal/personal/irrelevant

confidence.description: Model's confidence in this trigger decision

times.description: Time strings extracted from the message window. Empty array when trigger=false.

event_location.description: City/location explicitly mentioned as timezone context for the event. Null if not mentioned. Used as source pivot for conversion (one-time, does not update DB).
